reasoning: The visualization fails to answer the specific business question asked. The question asks for 'Wieviel Umsatz... in den Jahren' (How much revenue... in the years), which implies a yearly aggregation or comparison. The provided chart displays monthly data points for all four years overlaid on top of each other using a single x-axis representing months (Jan-Dec). This creates a cluttered view where it is difficult to compare total annual performance or see the trend year-over-year clearly. While the raw data is present, the aggregation level is wrong for the query. A bar chart showing one bar per year (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) with the summed total revenue would be the correct approach.
suggested_improvement: Aggregate the monthly revenue data by year and create a simple bar chart with Years (2021-2024) on the X-axis and Total Annual Revenue on the Y-axis.
